--- Main Page ---
Dee's Country Cocktail Lounge - Dee’s Country Cocktail Lounge
Skip to content
Welcome to your second home.
The venue with a 70’s country groove.
One of the Best 27 Bars in America 2020!
— Esquire Magazine
A neighborhood venue. Community builder.
An incubator of live music in Music City.
Open 7 days a week
4pm – After the Show
102 E Palestine Ave. Madison, TN. 37115 | 615.852.8827
The Rules
Pay your tab
Don’t be an asshole
You must be 21 years or older to enter.
Shows & Events
Dee’s is my watering hole… You can order whatever you want, but I’m just going to give you tequila.
— Margo Price
Musician / Guest Bartender
I couldn’t find a classic country venue around Nashville when I moved here, so I opened one
— Amy Dee
Owner / Music Lover
